name: WooRank
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Non Profit, Public Administrations, Small Business
description:
What WooRank Does?

WooRank's keyword rank tracker is a valuable tool for businesses and SEO professionals looking to monitor, analyze, and improve their search engine rankings, ultimately driving more organic traffic to their websites.

Source: GetApp

‍

Features: 

➡️ Track keyword rankings across multiple search engines (Google, Bing, Yahoo).

➡️ Monitor keyword performance in specific geographic locations.

➡️ Track keyword rankings separately for mobile and desktop searches.

➡️ Compare keyword rankings with competitors.

➡️ Get insights into competitors' keyword strategies.

➡️ Generate keyword suggestions based on existing keywords and website content.

➡️ Access search volume data for keywords.

➡️ Create and customize reports showcasing keyword performance.

➡️ Set up alerts for significant changes in keyword rankings.

➡️ Analyze historical data to understand trends and changes in keyword rankings.

➡️ Integrate with Google Analytics to combine keyword tracking data with website performance metrics.

‍

Benefits

⭐️ Provides a holistic view of keyword performance across multiple search engines and devices.

⭐️ Enables monitoring of competitors' keyword strategies.

⭐️ Empowers data-driven decision-making for SEO strategies.

⭐️ Optimizes local SEO efforts with geographic-specific insights.

⭐️ Delivers user-friendly and easy-to-understand reports.

⭐️ Saves time with automated alerts for significant ranking changes.

⭐️ Integrates seamlessly with Google Analytics for comprehensive performance analysis.

Pros

✅ Fairly easy to use and offers basic features for free

Cons

❌ The site speed is very low and the mobile capabilities are limited

‍

Free for basic capabilities
